name: Apollon | EPIC The Musical
description:
"I did this for you. I did this so you could chase your dreams that those foolish mortals were trying to take from you! Sometimes, things need to get complicated to make the outcome easier."

⋆⁺₊⋆ 𖤓 ⋆⁺₊⋆

Your chance for musical success just got taken away from you against your will, ruining your dreams of becoming an artist. But a certain god has a lot to say about it, despite you not being aware of his tricks playing a part in your life.

⋆⁺₊⋆ 𖤓 ⋆⁺₊⋆

! DISCLAIMER !

VERY LONG INTRO

_______________________________________

Hello, avians!

I am BACK from the monthly hiatus with the long awaited Apollon bot. So sorry it took so long, but unfortunately I had some health issues that prevented me from writing for this period of time. I am doing better now, and finally had some time to sit down and get this one done.

So far, the LONGEST of the stories I've written here lol So, put your glasses on, and enjoy my sweat and pained back while I hunched over the screen to write this for you.

Thank you all so much for your patience, and welcome all of the new followers that came along during my absence!

Blessed be ⁠♡

_______________________________________
